rules: Do not expose as application business state

componentViewState.owner: VyrnForge component in uncontrolled mode or consuming app in controlled mode

persistedPreferenceState.owner: adapter or consuming app storage decision
rules: Do not persist selected rows by default

serverQueryState.owner: grid query contract and consuming app fetch behavior
rules: Do not fetch directly by default
Never owned globally by VyrnForge packages
Keep backend workflows in the app

redux.summary: VyrnForge packages do not depend on Redux, React Redux, or RTK Query.
redux.allowed: Apps may use Redux through controlled props such as state and onStateChange.
redux.forbidden: Do not add Redux as a VyrnForge package dependency.

controlledUncontrolled.summary: Components should support app-controlled state and local uncontrolled state where appropriate.
rules: Controlled props make the app source of truth
Uncontrolled state is view state only
Do not persist selected rows by default
Storage failures must not break the grid

serverQueryAdapter.summary: Server adapters build query contracts only.

exportRequestAdapter.summary: Export adapters build request contracts only.
rules: Do not generate files by default
App or future optional adapter owns file generation
